title: Goblin Ambush

location.name: Triboar Trail — Ambush Site
location.description: About fifteen miles from Phandalin, the trail passes through a dense thicket. Two dead horses sprawl about fifty feet ahead, blocking the path. Several black-feathered arrows protrude from the carcasses.
location.environment: forest road, dense thicket, underbrush on both sides

read_aloud: You've been on the Triboar Trail for about half a day when you come around a bend and spot two dead horses sprawled about fifty feet ahead of you, blocking the path. Each has several black-feathered arrows sticking out of it. The woods press close to the trail here, with a steep embankment and dense thickets on either side.

enemies.position: Hidden in the thickets on both sides of the road, 30 feet from the dead horses

encounters.tactics: The goblins fire arrows from behind the thickets (half cover, +2 AC). If two or more goblins die, the remaining goblins attempt to flee north along a hidden trail toward Cragmaw Hideout. One goblin may try to surrender if cornered.
encounters.description: Four goblins ambush the party. They have surprise unless someone succeeds on a DC 10 Perception check (passive or active) before reaching the horses.

skill_checks.success: Notice the goblins hiding in the thickets before the ambush. Party is not surprised.
skill_checks.context: Passive or active Perception as the party approaches the dead horses.

skill_checks.success: The horses belong to Gundren Rockseeker and Sildar Hallwinter. Saddlebags have been looted. A trail leads northwest into the thickets.
skill_checks.failure: The horses look like they were ambushed. Nothing else obvious.
skill_checks.context: Examining the dead horses after combat.

skill_checks.success: A clear trail leads northwest. About a dozen goblin-sized footprints head in that direction. The trail is well-used.
skill_checks.failure: The underbrush is too thick to find a clear path.

traps.name: Goblin Snare
traps.trigger_description: On the trail to Cragmaw Hideout, about 10 minutes along
traps.effect: Character is restrained and dangling. Requires DC 10 Athletics or another character to cut them down.

traps.name: Goblin Pit
traps.trigger_description: On the trail to Cragmaw Hideout, about 30 minutes along
traps.effect: Character falls 10 feet into a pit.

secrets.info: An empty leather map case is found among the horse's belongings. Gundren had a map — the goblins took it.

dm_notes: This is the party's first combat. Walk them through initiative, attack rolls, and damage. The surprise round is important — let the goblins get their shots in. After combat, the Investigation/Survival checks reveal the trail to Cragmaw Hideout. If the party decides to skip the hideout and go straight to Phandalin, transition to ch2-act-I instead.
